transcription.text: Riverside Mechanics, this is Tom. Hey Tom, I'm Marcus. I got your number from a friend. My truck's transmission is slipping. Can you give me a ballpark? Sure, what's the year and model? 2018 Chevy Silverado 1500. For a full rebuild we're looking at $2,800 to $3,200 depending on parts. A fluid flush and band adjustment might fix it for around $450 if it's not too far gone. That's helpful. Let me think about it and call back. No problem Marcus, we're here when you're ready.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

New lead Marcus called about transmission issues on 2018 Chevy Silverado. Quote provided: rebuild $2,800-$3,200, flush/adjustment $450. Customer will call back.
